content: Remote OK Chief Growth Officer Original Peptide <p><strong>Company Description</strong> Original Peptide supplies high-quality peptides designed to support strength, energy, recovery, cognitive optimization, and overall wellness research. The company emphasizes rigorous standards of quality, purity, and accessibility, offering trusted compounds to individuals pursuing advanced health and performance goals. Its product range spans muscle support, metabolic balance, and restorative wellness applications, enabling customers to explore innovative approaches to well-being. Original Peptide is committed to providing reliable, cutting-edge tools backed by careful formulation and a strong focus on customer care.</p><p><strong>Role Description</strong> The Chief Growth Officer (CGO) is a full-time, remote role responsible for driving revenue growth, market expansion, and brand visibility for Original Peptide. This role oversees integrated growth strategies across sales, business development, and marketing, ensuring alignment with company objectives and regulatory considerations in the wellness and research sectors. Day-to-day responsibilities include developing and executing growth plans, optimizing customer acquisition and retention, managing sales pipelines, and identifying new market opportunities and strategic partnerships. The CGO will collaborate closely with leadership to set performance targets, analyze data and KPIs, refine pricing and positioning, and guide cross-functional teams toward sustainable, scalable growth. The role also involves staying informed about industry trends, competitive dynamics, and customer needs to inform product and go-to-market strategies.</p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Demonstrated expertise in Sales and Sales Management, including building high-performing teams and managing end-to-end sales cycles.</li><li>Strong Business Development skills, with experience identifying, negotiating, and managing strategic partnerships and new market opportunities.</li><li>Proficiency in Marketing and Digital Marketing, including campaign strategy, performance measurement, and brand positioning across channels.</li><li>Proven ability to develop and execute data-driven growth strategies, using analytics and KPIs to inform decisions and optimize outcomes.</li><li>Experience in health, wellness, life sciences, or related industries is highly beneficial, with familiarity around compliant growth practices.</li><li>Excellent leadership, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a remote, fast-paced environment.</li><li>Bachelorâs degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field; an advanced degree (MBA or equivalent) is a plus.</li><li>Recruit train and manage a national network of independent sales representatives </li><li>Negotiate large commercial agreements. </li><li>Procure new clinic and med-spa and similar accounts</li><li>Marketing - Coordinate with marketing to generate qualified leads.</li><li>Improve conversion rates.</li><li>Align campaigns with sales objectives.</li></ul> design, marketing, exec California, California, United States 2026-07-15T02:44:20+00:00 1134878 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-chief-growth-officer-original-peptide-1134878 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Chain Account Manager CELSIUS <p>IfÂ you'reÂ reading this on your way from 5am spin class to festival fast-pass,Â you'reÂ CELSIUSÂ®â an everyday hustler with the essential energy to aimÂ high, andÂ go the extra mile wherever your goals take you.Â </p><p>Joyful by design, sunny by nature, and unapologetically bold. Join our team and redefine what it means to be energized.Â <br></p><p>REGIONAL CHAIN ACCOUNT MANAGER, SALES - REGIONAL CHAIN ACCOUNTS </p><p><strong>Location:</strong> Remote (Ohio, Near Major Airport Required) </p><p><strong>Department: </strong>Sales</p><p><strong>Salary: </strong>$100K to $105K plus incentives</p><p><strong>People management: </strong>NO<br></p><p>Reporting to the Director, Small Format National Accounts, the <strong>Chain Account Manager</strong> will play a key role in the development and growth of Celsius products in the Small Format Channel with Regional scope. This position will contribute to Celsius values and vision by maximizing long-term brand volume while achieving annual sales budgets and profit goals.</p><p>This position is responsible for setting the go-to-market strategy, building joint business plans, cultivating high-impact partnerships, and aligning cross-functional efforts to drive revenue and brand visibility at retail. The ideal candidate is a high-energy individual with a customer centric approach, beverage sales experience, and a proven ability to manage both retail strategy and execution at the enterprise level.<br><br></p><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>5+ years of selling experience in the consumer products industry is required (Chain account experience required)</li><li>Bachelor's degree is required; MBA or advanced business coursework preferred</li><li>Knowledge of the beverage industry and how to execute direct sales, order management and logistics</li><li>Knowledge and experience of internal functions in CPG (i.e., Sales Resources, Business Planning, Marketing and Customer Service)</li><li>Strong business acumen, presentation skills, and cross-functional leadership skills</li><li>Proficient in Microsoft Office and data reporting tools (e.g., IRI, Excel)<br></li></ul><p><strong>Physical &amp; Travel Requirements</strong></p><ul><li>Must be able to travel :40%, including overnight</li><li>Must be able to lift up to 50 pounds, at times</li><li>Must live within 1 hour of a major international airport<br></li></ul><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><p><strong>Own Key Account Relationships:</strong></p><ul><li>Serve as the primary point of contact for major retail partners, meeting directly with buyers and decision-makers to drive sales growth and
